zh.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: 英國德比夏爾德比德比 聖 阿爾可蒙德
zh.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Louvain於大約1320年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton30歲，母親Joan de  Basing26歲。他於1344年與Margaret Weston在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年1月30日在英國素福爾可享年28歲，埋葬在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Louvain于大约1320年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton30岁，母亲Joan de  Basing26岁。他于1344年与Margaret Weston在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年1月30日在英国素福爾可享年28岁，埋葬在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Louvain was born about 1320, in Essex, England, his father, Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton, was 30 and his mother, Joan de  Basing, was 26. He married Margaret Weston in 1344, in Weston, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 30 January 1347, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Little Easton, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Louvain est né environ 1320, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de  Basing, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Weston en 1344, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1347, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre.

de.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Louvain um 1320 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton 30 und seine Mutter Joan de  Basing 26. Er hat 1344 in Weston, Staffordshire, England Margaret Weston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Januar 1347 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Little Easton, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Louvain è nato il circa 1320 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan de  Basing, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Weston nel 1344, nel Weston, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 30 gennaio 1347, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolto a Little Easton, Essex, England.

ja.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: イギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーデルビー スト アルクムンド

ja.Weston, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン
ja.lifeSummary: John Louvainが約1320年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Eastonは30歳，母Joan de  Basingは26歳であった。1344年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンでMargaret Westonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年1月30日にイギリススフォルクで28歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスリットル エアストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: 영국 더비실르 더비 더비 스트 알크먼드
ko.lifeSummary: John Louvain(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de  Basing(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 Margaret Weston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 1월 30일 영국 수폴크에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Louvain nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan de  Basing, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Weston em 1344, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1347, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultado em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.

ro.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England

ru.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: дирби ст алкмунд, дирби, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Louvain родился около 1320 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de  Basing, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Weston в 1344 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 30 января 1347 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Louvain nació aproximadamente 1320, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan de  Basing, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Weston en 1344, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de enero de 1347, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra.
